title: Bake & Blend Seafood Bake
description: A fresh and light one-pot American dish featuring a frozen seafood mix, perfect for the whole30 diet.

ingredients.name: Frozen Seafood Mix
ingredients.notes: Ensure it's marked 'Whole30-Friendly' on the packaging.

ingredients.name: Garlic Clove(s)
ingredients.notes: Use fresh or minced for added flavor.

ingredients.name: Fresh Thyme Sprigs
ingredients.notes: Optional but adds a nice aroma.

ingredients.name: Pepper Pinches
ingredients.notes: Both black and cayenne if preferred.

instructions: Melt a tablespoon of coconut oil in a large baking dish.
Add the frozen seafood mix evenly over the melted oil, ensuring all pieces are covered.
Sprinkle with the diced onion, minced garlic, and fresh thyme if using.
Season generously with pepper to taste. Optionally add a pinch or two of cayenne pepper for heat.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes.
After 20 minutes, gently stir the seafood mix and cook for an additional 10-15 minutes until heated through.
Serve warm as part of your dinner meal.
